basics.name: Russell Batchelor
basics.headline: Technical Operations Director (Interim) | Managed Services Performance, SLA & Contract Economics | SC + NPPV3 Cleared

summary.title: Professional Profile
summary.content:
Technical Operations Director and Interim COO with 20+ years delivering end-to-end operational accountability for PE-backed technology businesses, connectivity providers, and managed services platforms. Specialises in implementation-to-service transition, SLA governance, escalation control, and commercial discipline across the full contract-to-cash lifecycle.

Combines delivery authority with commercial governance: revenue assurance, billing integrity, cost-to-serve optimisation, vendor performance management, and Board-level KPI reporting. Repeatedly engaged by CEOs, Boards, and PE investors as the operational anchor for complex managed services businesses undergoing rapid growth, transformation, or international expansion.

items.description:
Own consultancy vehicle through which contract COO and Operations Director engagements are delivered to PE-backed and technology businesses. Each engagement involves functioning as the senior operational lead for the client organisation.

Key engagements (reverse chronological):

roles.position: Operations Director, Digital Gaming & Managed Services
roles.description:
MD-level operational lead for greenfield digital gaming and HFT platform — first of its kind for Las Vegas Sands in Europe. Held full P&L and commercial accountability for multi-jurisdiction, multi-vendor programme.

  • Owned complete contract-to-cash cycle: vendor contracts, SLA frameworks, billing accuracy, commercial event management, revenue assurance from operational launch.
  • Managed 24-engineer multilingual team day-to-day: live service performance, vendor SLA compliance, escalation management, customer-facing governance.
  • Built operational governance framework: weekly service reviews, Board-level KPI packs covering performance, risk, compliance, commercial position.
  • Accountable for managed infrastructure estate: 1,200+ gaming endpoints, primary data centre, 7 IDCs, AWS-integrated connectivity.
  • Designed operational handover model, support structures, performance baselines for sustainable live service transition.

Operations & Infrastructure Director across EMEA region, accountable for live portfolio of 15+ concurrent operational programmes serving Tier 1 finance, UK Government, NATO, and NHS clients.

  • Owned end-to-end commercial lifecycle: procurement, SLA governance, billing/inventory capture, vendor performance, programme closeout across 130-site rollouts.
  • Maintained operational continuity across 6,100+ circuit migrations, 7,000+ endpoint deployments; managed cutover risk, sequencing, service-continuity obligations at scale.
  • Governed operational risk/compliance across SD-WAN/SASE migrations in regulated environments including NATO-aligned and NHS infrastructure.
  • Tracked cost-to-serve, managed vendor SLA performance, produced executive reporting from engineering teams to C-Suite stakeholders.
  • Primary operational contact across diverse, high-pressure, multi-jurisdiction environments; led cross-functional teams through change and conflict resolution.

Operations Director scaling UK managed services and field operations business spanning telecommunications, enterprise networking for carrier and ISP clients.

  • Owned vendor SLA governance, billing accuracy, margin tracking, service performance reporting across UK field workforce.
  • Built operational governance framework: escalation pathways, contract compliance registers, cost-to-serve modelling, customer review forums.
  • Drove field ops efficiency through workforce scheduling, tooling standards, quality assurance across multi-site telecommunications deployments.

Contract Operations Director building and scaling technical managed services capability across UK market, focused on customer service operations, vendor governance, commercial lifecycle management.

  • Designed operational framework underpinning service delivery: SLA governance, billing controls, escalation processes, customer review cadence.
  • Owned vendor and subcontractor ecosystem: performance management, contract compliance, cost-to-serve analysis, margin protection.
  • Built cross-functional operations team, establishing roles, workflows, performance accountability across service, commercial, technical functions.
  • Reported directly to CEO and Board; produced operational performance dashboards covering service KPIs, revenue integrity, risk.

items.description:
Large-scale ICT and digital infrastructure transformation across 140+ council sites; owned programme governance, commercial reporting, supplier management.

  • Led authority-wide LAN/WAN and telephony transformation programmes delivering 60% cost reduction across 200+ sites.
  • Directed £12M voice and data services re-tender with strategic procurement and commercial governance.
  • Established operational governance frameworks, vendor performance management, service continuity controls.

items.name: Key Operational & Commercial Outcomes
items.description:
• P&L & Commercial Governance: LVS Bulgaria greenfield digital gaming platform — full contract-to-cash accountability, 24-engineer multilingual team, 1,200+ endpoints, 7 IDCs, Board KPI governance.
  • Managed Services Scale: CentricsIT EMEA Operations Director — 15+ concurrent programmes, 6,100+ circuit migrations, 7,000+ endpoint deployments across Tier 1 finance, NATO, NHS.
  • Strategic Commercial Outcomes: Lambeth 60% WAN cost reduction + £12M voice/data re-tender leadership spanning 200+ sites.
  • Revenue & Margin Discipline: Multi-jurisdiction operational control spanning UK, EMEA, Bulgaria, Las Vegas, Singapore with vendor SLA governance and cost-to-serve tracking.

items.content:
• Charles Stanley Group, Contract Operations Director, Technology & Infrastructure (Jan 2013 - May 2015) — Operations Director for regulated wealth management firm; owned IT service delivery, infrastructure resilience, vendor contracts, FCA-aligned operational compliance. Delivered 96+ infrastructure projects with operational governance, commercial controls, and regulatory compliance.
  • Ipitomi Ltd, Co-Founder & Managing Director (Jan 2008 - Feb 2011) — Co-founded subscription-based managed services provider; built complete commercial and operational function from startup through acquisition by Virgin Media Business. Designed contract-to-cash processes, SLA governance, revenue assurance for subscription managed services model.
  • Comunica, Operations Manager — Managed services and field operations leadership.
  • Virgin Media, Non-Standard Technical Design Authority — Technical design authority for broadband, fibre, and leased-line connectivity across UK enterprise and public sector deployments.
  • Whittington Insurance Markets, Head of IT & Network Operations (2001 - 2007) — Foundation role in IT and network operations leadership for Lloyd's of London insurance group; led team of 17, built operational governance framework, service delivery management, and infrastructure resilience in regulated financial services.

Notable: Northern Ireland Schools Connectivity Programme (Virgin Media / DoE, 1998-2000) — Programme lead and Non-Standard Design Authority for broadband, fibre, and leased-line connectivity across all 2,000 schools in Northern Ireland; 100% completion over 2-year DoE mandate. First time every school in Northern Ireland had internet access.

Vehicle: Hiloka Limited (sole director) | Target rate: £600-£800/day (flexible for right-fit engagement) | Availability: Within 2 weeks

Engagement type: SoW / output-based contracts | Location: UK-based; proven European and US delivery footprint | Interim / contract operating model; experienced with on-site and remote delivery

metadata.notes: Archetype C: Technical Operations Director (Interim). Tailored for PE-backed tech businesses, managed services providers, and connectivity companies needing operational leadership, SLA governance, and contract-to-cash discipline. Hiloka Ltd as umbrella with LVS, CentricsIT, Sitehands, Rainmaker as nested roles. Lambeth as standalone engagement. Earlier career compressed. No IoT claims - use telecommunications and connectivity. All skills unhidden for ATS. Rate £600-800/day flexible. Target rate NOT in CV body.

jobContext.job_description: Target roles: Technical Operations Director, Interim COO, Operations Director (Managed Services), Head of Service Operations, Contract Operations Director. Target sectors: PE-backed technology businesses, managed services providers, connectivity/telecoms companies, digital gaming platforms.
jobContext.job_highlights: Contract-to-cash governance, SLA management, implementation-to-service transition, Board-level KPI reporting, PE-backed operational scaling
jobContext.job_required_skills: Service operations, commercial controls, vendor management, operational governance, revenue assurance, cost-to-serve optimisation
